sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76138" key="o)fio/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀφῐό-εις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n76138.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abounding in serpents</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">78</biblScope> </bibl> [who has <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ο̄φ-</foreign>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὄφις</ref> </xr>]; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀφιοῦσσα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
